reference: Hi. Nowadays, menstrual anomalies mostly occur due to Polycystic Ovarian Disease. Polycystic Ovarian Disease may lead to changes in the menstrual cycle, a cyst in the ovary, difficulty getting pregnant, and other health issues. Polycystic Ovarian Disease is linked to changes in the levels of certain female hormones, such as estrogen and progesterone. You should undergo an ultrasound of the abdomen, and tests for estrogen, luteinizing hormone, follicle-stimulating hormone, lipid profile, and blood sugar levels. Additionally, check for hypothyroidism and inflammatory pelvic disorder. As per your description, you are already taking Kalachikai powder with honey. Kalachikai helps to manage cyst issues naturally. You should continue this powder, taking three grams twice a day with honey after meals for ninety days. Along with this, you can also take Hyponidd from Charak Pharmacy, two tablets twice a day after meals and Ashokarishtam, fifteen milliliters twice a day with an equal amount of water after meals. Avoid spicy and fried junk foods. Perform regular Kapalabhati and Mandukasana, as well as pranayama practices like Anuloma Viloma, Nadi Shodhana, and Bhramari.
text: Hi, nowadays menstrual anomalies mostly occur due to polycystic ovarian disease. Polycystic ovarian disease may lead to changes in the menstrual cycle, a cyst in the ovary, difficulty getting pregnant, and other health issues. Polycystic ovarian disease is linked to changes in the levels of certain female hormones, such as estrogen and progesterone. You should undergo an ultrasound of the abdomen and tests for estrogen, luteinizing hormone, follicle-stimulating hormone, lipid profile, and blood sugar levels. Additionally, check for hypothyroidism and inflammatory pelvic disorder. As per your description, you are already taking Kala Chakai powder with honey. Kala Chakai helps to manage cyst issues naturally. You should continue this powder, taking three grams twice a day with honey after meals for 90 days. Along with this, you can also take hypomeme from Cherik Pharmacy, two tablets twice a day after meals, and ashwagandha, 15 milliliters twice a day with an equal amount of water after meals. Avoid spicy and fried junk foods. Perform regular Kabbalah Bhati and Mendakasana, as well as pranayama practices like Anuloma Viloma, Nadi Shodhana, and Brahmari.
